title: Diamond Overhaul
description: This pack makes the diamond texture more realistic maintaining the vanilla look
body:
This small pack changes the diamond texture to be more realistic, with a new simple and vanilla friendly texture.

![Texture with resource pack on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d90a85df03db82b73a10bde290f540680bdfe8b4.png)
